John Doe

Salesforce Solution Architect

New York, NY john.doe@example.com
LinkedIn GitHub

Professional Summary

Results-driven Salesforce Solution Architect with 10+ years of experience designing and implementing enterprise-scale CRM solutions. Certified across the Salesforce platform with deep expertise in Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, CPQ, and integration architecture using MuleSoft and REST APIs. Proven track record of delivering complex multi-cloud implementations for Fortune 500 companies.

Experience

Senior Salesforce Solution Architect

2020-01 — Present
Accenture • New York, NY

Lead architect for enterprise Salesforce implementations across financial services and healthcare verticals.

  • Designed and delivered a multi-org Salesforce architecture serving 5,000+ users across 12 business units
  • Architected MuleSoft-based integration layer connecting Salesforce with SAP ERP, resulting in 40% reduction in data sync time
  • Led a CPQ implementation that reduced quote-to-cash cycle by 60%
  • Mentored a team of 8 junior developers and administrators

Salesforce Technical Lead

2016-06 — 2019-12
Deloitte Digital • Chicago, IL

Technical lead for Salesforce Service Cloud and Sales Cloud implementations.

  • Delivered 12 full-cycle Salesforce implementations for mid-to-large enterprise clients
  • Built custom Lightning Web Components library used across 5 client projects
  • Designed RESTful API integration patterns for Salesforce-to-ERP connectivity
  • Achieved 98% client satisfaction rating across all project deliverables

Salesforce Developer

2013-08 — 2016-05
Cognizant Technology Solutions • Austin, TX

Salesforce developer focused on Apex, Visualforce, and process automation.

  • Developed complex Apex trigger frameworks for bulk data processing
  • Implemented Salesforce Communities portals for B2B partner management
  • Created automated testing frameworks using Apex test classes achieving 85%+ coverage
  • Migrated legacy on-premise CRM to Salesforce, moving 2M+ records
